calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Gender.
Dept. 514, Judge: K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Petitioner Samantha Lynn Shepherd present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male to Female.
Decree Changing Name and Gender was submitted to and signed by the Court.
